dogs.name: Buddy
dogs.description: Loves fetch and swimming. Very energetic and great with kids.

dogs.name: Luna
dogs.description: Extremely playful and vocal. Loves cold weather and long runs.

dogs.name: Max
dogs.description: Highly intelligent and loyal. Previously trained as a service dog.

dogs.name: Bella
dogs.description: Calm and affectionate. Loves cuddles and short walks.

dogs.name: Charlie
dogs.description: Curious and mischievous. Has a nose for everything and loves to explore.

dogs.name: Daisy
dogs.description: Elegant and smart. Excels at agility training and loves to learn tricks.

dogs.name: Rocky
dogs.description: Gentle giant despite his size. Very protective and loyal to his family.

dogs.name: Mia
dogs.description: Loves being groomed and pampered. Very sociable with strangers.

dogs.name: Thor
dogs.description: Alert and fearless. Highly trainable and bonds strongly with one person.

dogs.name: Coco
dogs.description: Stubborn but charming. Loves burrowing under blankets and belly rubs.
